B

bidirectionalBind(ObservableValue<T>) - Method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.Property
This allows for both values to change if each other change, keeping them in sync.
bind(ObservableValue<T>) - Method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.Property
This type of bind is such that this value changes when the other value changes.

DOUBLE - Enum constant in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.Value.Type
 
Duration - Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.time
This class represents a duration that will allow arithmetic operations using the custom TimeUnits
This stores the value as milliseconds
The methods should be pretty obvious
Duration() - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.Duration
 
Duration(TimeUnit, long) - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.Duration

Gets this object as a boolean.

Gets this object as a double.
getAsEnum(Class<T>) - Method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.Value
Gets the object as an enum based on the parameter.

Gets this object as an integer.
getAsLong() - Method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.Value

getClassField(Class<?>, String) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.reflection.ReflectionHelper
Recursively gets a field from a class and it's parent class(es)
getClassFields(Class<?>) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.reflection.ReflectionHelper
Recursively gets all fields from a class and it's parent class(es)
getClassFields(Class<?>, Set<Field>) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.reflection.ReflectionHelper
The is a helper method for the other one and gets all fields from the provided class and the parent class(es)
getClassMethod(Class<?>, String, Class<?>...) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.reflection.ReflectionHelper
Recursively gets a method of a class from itself or it's parent class(es)
getClassMethods(Class<?>) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.reflection.ReflectionHelper
Recursively gets all methods of a class and of it's parent class(es)
getClassMethods(Class<?>, Set<Method>) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.reflection.ReflectionHelper
The is a helper method for the other one and gets all methods from the provided class and the parent class(es)

ObservableLinkedList<T> - Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections.impl.list

ObservableList<T> - Interface in com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections
A list that can be observed for changes.
Use ListChangeListener to listen to these changes.
ObservableMap<K,V> - Interface in com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections
A Map that can be observed for changes.
Use MapChangeListener to listen to these changes.
ObservableSet<T> - Interface in com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections
A set that can be observed for changes.
Use SetChangeListener to listen to these changes.
ObservableTreeMap<K extends Comparable<K>,V> - Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections.impl.map
 
ObservableTreeMap() - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.collections.impl.map.ObservableTreeMap

Parses a date that is split with colons.

parseRawDate(String) - Method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeParser
See the other documentation, just returns it as an object instead of a time
parseTime(String) - Method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeParser
Parses a String based time into milliseconds.
pow(long) - Method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.Duration
 
Property<T> - Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.observable
An observable value that allows binding the value to another and/or vica versa
There are plans for default Properties for java types to make it easier, but that will be in future updates.
Property() - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.Property
 
Property(T) - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.Property

R

ReflectionHelper - Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.reflection
A class to make it easier to recursively get fields and methods of a class
There is no caching of these though, but this is planned.
ReflectionHelper() - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starlib.reflection.ReflectionHelper

runTask(Runnable) - Method in interface com.stardevllc.starlib.task.TaskFactory
Runs a runnable task.
runTaskAsynchronously(Runnable) - Method in interface com.stardevllc.starlib.task.TaskFactory
Runs a runnable task in an Async Thread.
runTaskLater(Runnable, long) - Method in interface com.stardevllc.starlib.task.TaskFactory
Runs a task with a given delay
runTaskLaterAsynchronously(Runnable, long) - Method in interface com.stardevllc.starlib.task.TaskFactory
Runs a task async with a given delay
runTaskTimer(Runnable, long, long) - Method in interface com.stardevllc.starlib.task.TaskFactory
Runs a task on a timer and an initial delay
runTaskTimerAsynchronously(Runnable, long, long) - Method in interface com.stardevllc.starlib.task.TaskFactory
Runs an async task on a timer and an initial delay

subtract(TimeUnit, long) - Method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.Duration
 

T

Task - Interface in com.stardevllc.starlib.task
A simple interface for information related to a Scheduler task
TaskFactory - Interface in com.stardevllc.starlib.task
This class allows running tasks either now, with a delay or with a delay and a period
This is mainly meant for use of abstracting code that is primarily used with Spigot as the structure is similar to that of the BukkitScheduler
If you want a default implementation, the Java Timer class works pretty well, just implement this class and use the timer for the later methods
TICKS - Enum constant in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
 
TimeFormat - Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.time
Allows formatting a time in milliseconds similar to how the Java NumberFormat works.
TimeFormat(String) - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeFormat
Constructs a new time format
TimeParser - Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.time
A class to parse a time string.
TimeParser() - Constructor for class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeParser
 
TimeParser.ParsedDate - Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.time
 
TimeUnit - Enum Class in com.stardevllc.starlib.time
An enum utility to make working with times easier.

toDays(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the days equivalent, Note: Converting from lower units to higher units will loose precision
toDouble(Object) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.Numbers
 
toFloat(Object) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.Numbers
 
toHours(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the hours equivalent, Note: Converting from lower units to higher units will loose precision
toInt(Object) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.Numbers
 
toLong(Object) - Static method in class com.stardevllc.starlib.Numbers
 
toMillis(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the millisecond equivalent
toMinutes(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the minutes equivalent, Note: Converting from lower units to higher units will loose precision
toMonths(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the months equivalent, Note: Converting from lower units to higher units will loose precision
toSeconds(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the seconds equivalent, Note: Converting from lower units to higher units will loose precision

toTicks(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the ticks equivalent, Note: Converting from lower units to higher units will loose precision
toWeeks(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the weeks equivalent, Note: Converting from lower units to higher units will loose precision
toYears(long) - Method in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
Converts the amount to the years equivalent, Note: Converting from lower units to higher units will loose precision

Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

W

WEEKS - Enum constant in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
The WEEKS value is based on a 7.604166666666667-day week.

Y

YEARS - Enum constant in enum class com.stardevllc.starlib.time.TimeUnit
The YEARS value is based on a 365-day year.
